ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "vegas_spread" REAL /* Vegas spread for the game */,
  "vegas_total" REAL /* Vegas total for the game */,
  "court" TEXT /* Court where the game was played */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "game_venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "reg_dif" REAL /* Difference in regular season performance between teams */,
  "over_dif" REAL /* Difference in over performance between teams */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the team is participating in */,
  "team_foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_location" TEXT /* City and state where the team is based */,
  "team_coach" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport the league belongs to */,
  "league_foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "league_website" TEXT /* URL of the league's official website */,
  "league_president" TEXT /* Name of the league president */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leagues_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the tournament belongs to */,
  "tournament_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "tournament_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "tournament_location" TEXT /* Location where the tournament is held */,
  "tournament_description" TEXT /* Description of the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "sport_description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  "sport_popularity" TEXT /* Popularity of the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "player_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "player_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "player_jersey_number" TEXT /* Jersey number of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played by the player */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of personal fouls */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_summaries" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game summary */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "crowd_sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the crowd */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_summaries_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player profile */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "profile" TEXT /* Profile of the player */,
  "player_bio" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the player */,
  "player_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the player */,
  "player_awards" TEXT /* Awards and achievements of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_profiles_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the user */,
  "user_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_creator" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_audit" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the column */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the column */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "audit_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "audit_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_audit_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_audit_audit_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("audit_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
